message: feat: route dictation output through paste delivery

files.patch:
@@ -7,10 +7,11 @@ final class AppController: ObservableObject {

     private let speechModelManager: SpeechModelManager
     private let hotkeyMonitor: any HotkeyMonitoring
+    private let pasteTargetMonitor: any PasteTargetMonitoring
     private let pipelineGate: PipelineGate
     private let audioRecorder: any AudioRecording
     private let speechTranscriber: any SpeechTranscribing
-    private let clipboardWriter: any ClipboardWriting
+    private let textPasteDeliverer: any TextPasteDelivering
     private let overlayPresenter: any OverlayPresenting
     private let soundPlayer: any SoundEffectPlaying
     private let traceBuilder: any DictationSessionTraceBuilding
@@ -22,29 +23,37 @@ final class AppController: ObservableObject {
         settingsStore: SettingsStore = SettingsStore(),
         speechModelManager: SpeechModelManager? = nil,
         hotkeyMonitor: (any HotkeyMonitoring)? = nil,
+        pasteTargetMonitor: (any PasteTargetMonitoring)? = nil,
         pipelineGate: PipelineGate = PipelineGate(),
         audioRecorder: (any AudioRecording)? = nil,
         speechTranscriber: (any SpeechTranscribing)? = nil,
-        clipboardWriter: (any ClipboardWriting)? = nil,
+        textPasteDeliverer: (any TextPasteDelivering)? = nil,
         overlayPresenter: (any OverlayPresenting)? = nil,
         soundPlayer: (any SoundEffectPlaying)? = nil,
         traceBuilder: (any DictationSessionTraceBuilding)? = nil
     ) {
         let sharedWhisperRuntime = WhisperRuntimeBridge()
         let catalog = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish]
+        let pasteTargetMonitor = pasteTargetMonitor ?? ContinuousPasteTargetMonitor.shared
         self.settingsStore = settingsStore
         self.speechModelManager = speechModelManager ?? SpeechModelManager(
             catalog: catalog,
             loader: WhisperSpeechModelLoader(runtime: sharedWhisperRuntime)
         )
         self.hotkeyMonitor = hotkeyMonitor ?? GlobalHotkeyMonitor()
+        self.pasteTargetMonitor = pasteTargetMonitor
         self.pipelineGate = pipelineGate
         self.audioRecorder = audioRecorder ?? LiveAudioRecorder()
         self.speechTranscriber = speechTranscriber ?? SpeechTranscriber(
             catalog: catalog,
             whisperRuntime: sharedWhisperRuntime
         )
-        self.clipboardWriter = clipboardWriter ?? PasteboardClipboardWriter()
+        self.textPasteDeliverer = textPasteDeliverer ?? TextPasteDeliverer(
+            pasteboard: GeneralPasteboardController(),
+            targetDetector: AccessibilityPasteTargetDetector(monitor: pasteTargetMonitor),
+            keystrokePreparer: CommandVPasteKeystrokePreparer(),
+            sessionCapturer: PasteSessionCapturer()
+        )
         self.overlayPresenter = overlayPresenter ?? OverlayPresenter()
         self.soundPlayer = soundPlayer ?? SystemSoundPlayer()
         self.traceBuilder = traceBuilder ?? NoOpDictationSessionTraceBuilder()
@@ -58,6 +67,7 @@ final class AppController: ObservableObject {
         hasStarted = true
         status = .loading
 
+        pasteTargetMonitor.start()
         await speechModelManager.load(modelID: settingsStore.speechModelID)
 
         if speechModelManager.phase == .error {
@@ -164,10 +174,26 @@ final class AppController: ObservableObject {
         )
 
         if let transcription, !transcription.isEmpty {
-            clipboardWriter.write(transcription)
-            activeTrace?.markPasteEnd()
-            overlayPresenter.show(.copiedToClipboard)
-            scheduleClipboardDismiss()
+            overlayPresenter.show(.cleaningUp)
+            status = .cleaningUp
+
+            var callbacks = PasteLifecycleCallbacks()
+            callbacks.onPasteStart = { [weak self] in
+                self?.activeTrace?.markPasteStart()
+            }
+            callbacks.onPasteEnd = { [weak self] _ in
+                self?.activeTrace?.markPasteEnd()
+            }
+
+            let result = await textPasteDeliverer.deliver(transcription, callbacks: callbacks)
+
+            switch result {
+            case .pasted:
+                overlayPresenter.dismiss()
+            case .copiedToClipboard:
+                overlayPresenter.show(.copiedToClipboard)
+                scheduleClipboardDismiss()
+            }
         } else {
             overlayPresenter.dismiss()
         }
